description: Create an interactive Riemann sum exploration in GeoGebra for the function f(x) = sin(x) on the interval [0, π]. The applet must include the function, an integer slider 'n' (range 1 to 50) controlling the number of rectangles, and both Upper and Lower Riemann Sums linked to that slider. Additionally, include the exact integral value for comparison and a text annotation displaying the area values. Save the project as 'riemann_sums.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
